---
title: "03_size_bd_GAM_analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| output: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show setup code"

# setup
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, janitor, here, tidybayes, patchwork)

```

# Load data
```{r}

load(here("size_bd_gam", "intermediates", "brms_data_gam_2026-04-05.RData"))

raca_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae")
ramu_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_muscosa",
         svl_mm >= 20)
rasi_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_sierrae",
         svl_mm >= 20)

```

# load models
```{r}
m2_zln_raca = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_raca.rds"))
m2_zln_ramu = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_ramu.rds"))
m2_zln_rasi = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_rasi.rds"))

```

# visualize results

## including metamophs
```{r}
metamorph_svl_prev_plot = function(species_fit, species_data, cutoff_mm, species_name) {
  # non-metamorph: vary svl_mm, smooth is active
  nd_notmet <- tibble(
    svl_mm          = seq(min(species_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),
                          max(species_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),
                          length.out = 200),
    is_metamorph    = 0,
    is_not_metamorph = 1,
    precip_mm_30_z  = 0, precip_mm_30_z2 = 0,
    temp_c_30_z     = 0, temp_c_30_z2    = 0
  )
  
  # metamorph: svl_mm is irrelevant (smooth is off), use a dummy value
  nd_met <- tibble(
    svl_mm           = mean(species_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),  # doesn't matter
    is_metamorph     = 1,
    is_not_metamorph = 0,
    precip_mm_30_z   = 0, precip_mm_30_z2 = 0,
    temp_c_30_z      = 0, temp_c_30_z2    = 0
  )
  
  # non-metamorph
  hu_notmet   <- nd_notmet |> add_epred_draws(species_fit, dpar = "hu",  re_formula = NA)
  
  # metamorph — keep all draws for boxplot distribution
  hu_met      <- nd_met    |> add_epred_draws(species_fit, dpar = "hu",  re_formula = NA)
  
  # non-metamorph: median + interval over svl sequence
  prev_notmet_agg <- hu_notmet |>
    mutate(prevalence = 1 - plogis(hu)) |>    # adjust if hu is already on prob scale
    group_by(svl_mm) |>
    median_qi(prevalence, .width = 0.89)
  
  # metamorph: keep raw draws for boxplot
  prev_met_draws <- hu_met |>
    mutate(prevalence = 1 - plogis(hu))
  
  # --- prevalence ---
  p_prev_met <- ggplot(prev_met_draws, aes(x = "metamorph", y = prevalence)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "#8DA0CB", alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = species_name) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_classic()
  
  p_prev_notmet <- ggplot(prev_notmet_agg, aes(x = svl_mm, y = prevalence)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .lower, ymax = .upper), fill = "#8DA0CB", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_line(color = "#8DA0CB", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = cutoff_mm, linetype = "dashed", color = "#666") +
    labs(x = "SVL (mm)", y = NULL) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y  = element_blank()
    )
  
  p_prev <- p_prev_met + p_prev_notmet +
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 3)) +
    plot_annotation(title = paste0(species_name))
  
 
  return(p_prev)
}

metamorph_svl_load_plot = function(species_fit, species_data, cutoff_mm, species_name) {
  # non-metamorph: vary svl_mm, smooth is active
  nd_notmet <- tibble(
    svl_mm          = seq(min(species_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),
                          max(species_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),
                          length.out = 200),
    is_metamorph    = 0,
    is_not_metamorph = 1,
    precip_mm_30_z  = 0, precip_mm_30_z2 = 0,
    temp_c_30_z     = 0, temp_c_30_z2    = 0
  )
  
  # metamorph: svl_mm is irrelevant (smooth is off), use a dummy value
  nd_met <- tibble(
    svl_mm           = mean(species_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),  # doesn't matter
    is_metamorph     = 1,
    is_not_metamorph = 0,
    precip_mm_30_z   = 0, precip_mm_30_z2 = 0,
    temp_c_30_z      = 0, temp_c_30_z2    = 0
  )
  
  # non-metamorph
  mu_notmet   <- nd_notmet |> add_epred_draws(species_fit, dpar = "mu",  re_formula = NA)
  
  # metamorph — keep all draws for boxplot distribution
  mu_met      <- nd_met    |> add_epred_draws(species_fit, dpar = "mu",  re_formula = NA)
  
  # non-metamorph: median + interval over svl sequence
  mu_notmet_agg <- mu_notmet |>
    group_by(svl_mm) |>
    median_qi(mu, .width = 0.89)
  
  # metamorph: keep raw draws for boxplot
  mu_met_draws <- mu_met
  
  # --- mu ---
  # get shared y range first
  mu_ylim <- range(c(mu_notmet_agg$.lower, mu_notmet_agg$.upper))
  
  p_mu_met <- ggplot(mu_met_draws, aes(x = "metamorph", y = mu)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "#FC8D62", alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = species_name) +
    ylim(mu_ylim) +
    theme_classic()
  
  p_mu_notmet <- ggplot(mu_notmet_agg, aes(x = svl_mm, y = mu)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .lower, ymax = .upper), fill = "#FC8D62", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_line(color = "#FC8D62", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = cutoff_mm, linetype = "dashed", color = "#666") +
    labs(x = "Post-metamorphic SVL (mm)", y = NULL) +
    ylim(mu_ylim) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y  = element_blank()
    )
  
  p_mu <- p_mu_met + p_mu_notmet +
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 3))
  
  return(p_mu)
}

raca_prev_p = metamorph_svl_prev_plot(m2_zln_raca, raca_data, 50, "Rana cascadea")
ramu_prev_p = metamorph_svl_prev_plot(m2_zln_ramu, ramu_data, 40, "Rana muscosa")
rasi_prev_p = metamorph_svl_prev_plot(m2_zln_rasi, rasi_data, 40, "Rana sierrae")

raca_load_p = metamorph_svl_load_plot(m2_zln_raca, raca_data, 50, "Rana cascadea")
ramu_load_p = metamorph_svl_load_plot(m2_zln_ramu, ramu_data, 40, "Rana muscosa")
rasi_load_p = metamorph_svl_load_plot(m2_zln_rasi, rasi_data, 40, "Rana sierrae")


ylab_dummy_prev <- ggplot() + 
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "Bd prevalence", angle = 90, size = 5) +
  theme_void() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 10)

ylab_dummy_load <- ggplot() + 
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "log(Bd load)", angle = 90, size = 5) +
  theme_void() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 10)

p_prev <- (ylab_dummy_prev + wrap_plots(list(raca_prev_p, ramu_prev_p, rasi_prev_p), nrow = 3)) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(0.05, 1))

p_load <- (ylab_dummy_load + wrap_plots(list(raca_load_p, ramu_load_p, rasi_load_p), nrow = 3)) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(0.05, 1))

ggsave(here("size_bd_gam", "gam_figures", "03_metamorph_svl_combined_prevalence.png"),
       p_prev,
       width = 8, height = 8)

ggsave(here("size_bd_gam", "gam_figures", "03_metamorph_svl_combined_load.png"),
       p_load,
       width = 8, height = 8)

p_prev
p_load

```

# Recreate groups
```{r}
hu_draws_groups = hu_draws %>%
  mutate(life_stage_simple = case_when(
    taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae" & svl_mm >= 50 ~ "adult",
    taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae" & svl_mm < 50 ~ "subadult",
    taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa", "rana_sierrae") & svl_mm >= 40 ~ "adult",
    taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa", "rana_sierrae") & svl_mm < 40 ~ "subadult"
  ))

mu_draws_groups = mu_draws %>%
  mutate(life_stage_simple = case_when(
    taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae" & svl_mm >= 50 ~ "adult",
    taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae" & svl_mm < 50 ~ "subadult",
    taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa", "rana_sierrae") & svl_mm >= 40 ~ "adult",
    taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa", "rana_sierrae") & svl_mm < 40 ~ "subadult"
  ))

hu_groups_agg = hu_draws_groups %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture, life_stage_simple) %>%
  median_qi(hu, .width = c(.89))

mu_groups_agg = mu_draws_groups %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture, life_stage_simple) %>%
  median_qi(mu, .width = c(.89))


```
